creator: greid@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Your PR used a very old ports layout - things have changed somewhat. Please 
read the documentation at 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO_8859-1/books/porters-handbook/ for more 
information. 

I cleaned up your port for the new layout and committed it anyway.
